metadata.methodology: Systematic sampling at ~14-record intervals across 419-record dataset

deficiencies_found.description: Blood pressure increase concern from clinical studies (ABPM data showing ~4/2 mmHg increases)
deficiencies_found.notes: CV safety concern maps well to CAT-04-D

deficiencies_found.description: Suicide attempt/depression signal - two cases of suicide attempt including one completed suicide
deficiencies_found.notes: Safety signal appropriately maps to safety update

deficiencies_found.description: Prescribing information revisions needed per PLR requirements
Carton and container labeling revisions needed
IFU optimization for uncapping device - use errors in validation studies
deficiencies_found.notes: Use-related risk from HF validation study

deficiencies_found.description: Pivotal trial showed efficacy on co-primary endpoints only at one dose; additional clinical concerns about dose-response

sampled_crls.company_name: Sun Pharma Advanced Research Company Limited

deficiencies_found.description: Prescribing information revisions needed - minor revisions to labeling
Facility inspection deficiencies - satisfactory resolution required
Manufacturing facility inspection deficiencies conveyed to facility representative
Pre-license inspection deficiencies at manufacturing facility (FEI 1819470)
Product quality - no commercial release lot available per 21 CFR 601.20(b)(1)
Device component received Not Approvable letter on PMA - combination product issue
deficiencies_found.notes: Device/combination product deficiency not captured in taxonomy - this is a device PMA issue, not purely clinical

deficiencies_found.description: Failed to demonstrate efficacy for traditional approval - primary endpoint not met in randomized trial (6MWT p=0.97, TFS p=0.89)
Surrogate endpoints (LVSV, MLCL:CL ratio, acylcarnitines) not accepted for accelerated approval
Facility inspection deficiencies at drug product manufacturing facility

deficiencies_found.notes: PMR/PMC requirements not captured as a distinct taxonomy category

deficiencies_found.description: cGMP non-compliance at drug substance manufacturing facility - parts 210/211 violations
Process validation deficiencies - commercial process not confirmed
Single Phase 3 trial showed PFS benefit but potential 25% decrease in OS (HR 1.25) - risk-benefit unacceptable
Dissolution acceptance criterion not supported by data
CGMP inspection deficiencies at drug product facility - FDA Form 483 issued
Labeling disagreement - sponsor notified they cannot submit revised labeling during review cycle
Impurity specifications above qualification threshold per ICH Q3B(R2) - inadequate nonclinical qualification study
deficiencies_found.notes: This is really a CMC/impurities issue (CAT-03-G) requiring nonclinical qualification data. The taxonomy labels it nonclinical but it's primarily an impurity qualification deficiency

deficiencies_found.description: Dermal rabbit study insufficient tissue battery for systemic toxicity assessment
Chemistry, Manufacturing and Controls deficiencies noted
Facility records review found objectionable conditions at manufacturing facility
Missing Deliverable Volume test per USP <698>
18-month expiration dating not supported - 2 of 6 batches failed at 18 months
Additional stability data needed for newer batches
In-use stability data inadequate for 3-month opened bottle period
Evening dosing PK predictions not confirmed by safety data - 33% insomnia rate in Phase 3
Chemistry, Manufacturing, and Controls deficiencies (heavily redacted - gene therapy BLA)
Numerous CMC corrections needed - typographical errors, data/calculation errors in validation reports
Unexplained drug concentration spikes in 6% of patients - up to 5x higher than average
In vitro drug release acceptance criteria need revision - additional sampling timepoint at 72h
Bridging between clinical and commercial drug product not established - >15% difference at timepoints
Use-Related Risk Analysis incomplete - missing critical tasks for microsphere re-suspension
Working Cell Bank stability issues - root causes identified, corrective actions needed
Facility inspection could not be completed - facility not ready for inspection
Pre-license inspection deficiencies conveyed to facility - Form 483 response required
Nitrosamine impurities likely present - need updated release/stability specs and analytical methods
Medication Guide statement needed on carton per 21 CFR 208.24(d)
Instructions for use and dose information inadequate; adverse event rates poorly characterized
Drug Product Specification - validated analytical methods needed
Drug Product Stability data inadequate without quantitative methods
Microbiological aspects - revalidation program inadequate, endotoxin testing validation missing
Carton/container labels need approved trade name
Prescribing information format deficiencies per 21 CFR 201.56/201.57
Facility inspection could not be completed - facility not ready

deficiencies_found.notes: PMR section not covered by taxonomy

deficiencies_found.description: Outstanding product quality deficiencies affecting acceptability of BE study lots
Drug substance nitrosamine/mutagenic impurity - AI limit not properly established per ICH guidance
Nonclinical - impurity specification above ICH Q3B(R2) qualification threshold
deficiencies_found.notes: Listed under NONCLINICAL section in CRL but is really an impurities/specs issue (CAT-03-G) not a nonclinical tox study issue (CAT-05)

deficiencies_found.description: Botanical raw material authentication inadequate - only morphology used
Microbial control strategy inadequate for BSP and DS manufacturing
Container closure integrity test validation inadequate - cannot detect 20 micron leaks
Multiple bioburden and endotoxin method validation deficiencies
Process validation data not yet provided (committed but outstanding)
Clinical site GCP inspections found significant noncompliance - unblinding events, unreliable assessments
deficiencies_found.notes: GCP/clinical site inspection deficiencies not in taxonomy - distinct from clinical efficacy or facility GMP

deficiencies_found.description: HF validation study identified use errors/close calls - no revisions implemented to product interface
Extensive IFU revisions needed for prefilled pen - injection site, dose confirmation, cap removal errors
Device labeling and design changes recommended for prefilled pen

deficiencies_found.notes: Non-proprietary name/suffix assignment not in taxonomy

deficiencies_found.description: Facility inspection objectionable conditions at manufacturing site
Comparative analytical assessment data quality issues - SPR and ELISA data omission/exclusion concerns
Insufficient data to determine TX01 is highly similar to Neupogen
Facility inspection deficiencies at Alvotech hf, Reykjavik, Iceland
Medication Guide - pharmacist statement needed per 21 CFR 208.24(d)
Product quality - comparative analytical assessment comment (not approvability issue)
Bacterial retention study inadequate for drug product sterile filtration
Container closure integrity test dye ingress method not validated for reproducibility between analysts
Clarity specification not justified by clinical/manufacturing experience
Shelf-life limit for aggregates not supported by stability data
Clinical product manufactured at different facility than to-be-marketed product - bridging inadequate
Leachable compounds not fully identified above qualification threshold of 5 mcg/day
deficiencies_found.notes: CRL lists under NONCLINICAL but this is really a leachables/extractables impurity issue (CAT-03-G). The nonclinical component is toxicological risk assessment.
